title: Zoro and Kin'emon Seek Luffy
description: Pages 1–5 focus on zoro and kin'emon seek luffy, keeping the Dressrosa conflict centered on the characters active in this scene.
scene: This part follows Unknown person #1, Sanji, Unknown person #2, Unknown person #3, Unknown person #4, Unknown person #5, Unknown person #6 as sanji and Violet share information, Zoro and Kin'emon try to reach Luffy, and the Donquixote Family reacts to Violet's betrayal.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: "I don't know how

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: I've got way more business worrying about Nami-san than you do!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: And you know that she'd much prefer that I save her!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: That's why I'm going!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: Fine, just go then!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: Kinemon, this is a map to the toy house where your friend is being held.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: Ohhh many thanks!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: If you're able to meet up with luffy, this will connect you to the Sunny!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: Let's try to confirm everyone's whereabouts and safety.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: I'm return- ing to the Sunny.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: So, how do we see Luffy?

dialogue.speaker: Kinemon
dialogue.text: ...I know not, which is why I've been standing here, that it is!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: Every entrance is firmly shut...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: And it was my acting strangely earlier that led to my capture.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: Alright, should we cut down this wall!?

dialogue.speaker: Kinemon
dialogue.text: That counts as acting strangely, that it does!!

dialogue.speaker: Zoro
dialogue.text: Okay, we'll cut it gently.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: It's not a matter of your enthusiasm- ASM!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #15
dialogue.text: Uwahhh!!

dialogue.speaker: Zoro
dialogue.text: That's the pirate Hunter Zoro-senpai!!! From the felling of 100:Foes at whiskey peak to the time when he hacked all of Enies Lobby to 'pieces...

dialogue.speaker: Gladius
dialogue.text: Gladius...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #16
dialogue.text: Could you calm down a little?

dialogue.speaker: Baby 5
dialogue.text: Baby-5...

dialogue.speaker: Gladius
dialogue.text: The betrayal of that woman...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #17
dialogue.text: Do you have any idea how much she's screwed up our plans!?

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: Violet captured "Black Leg Sanji"...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #18
dialogue.text: and extracted from his mind all of the enemies' strategies...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #19
dialogue.text: We could've stopped them at every turn.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #20
dialogue.text: and killed every one of them....!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #21
dialogue.text: But then what the hell did she go and do? Brought down her own men and ran away!?

dialogue.speaker: Gladius
dialogue.text: Kyahhh calm down!! Are you gonna explode here and now!!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #22
dialogue.text: Now I've lost control of the plans and the time!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #23
dialogue.text: I hate it enough to die!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #24
dialogue.text: Not to mention that we... well,

dialogue.speaker: Violet
dialogue.text: Violet's been acting strangely since last night...

dialogue.speaker: Doflamingo
dialogue.text: Anyone who betrays young master... We can't let them live!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #25
dialogue.text: Just think about it... with her clairvoy- once, she should have been able to find the Straw Hats' ship sometime yesterday.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #26
dialogue.text: NorthEast Dressrosa, heading towards Green Bit.

dialogue.speaker: Violet
dialogue.text: Noooo this just won't do, Violet- Chann!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #27
dialogue.text: You have to keep your promise and wait for me at the harbor.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #28
dialogue.text: Hehe hehe!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #29
dialogue.text: The Harbor is already crawl-ling with Marines.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #30
dialogue.text: It'd be best if we decided on a different location for me to meet up with you.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #31
dialogue.text: Really, the Marines...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #32
dialogue.text: There were four battle- ships in all...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #33
dialogue.text: Even low esti- mates would place at least 3,000 Marines in this country, now...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #34
dialogue.text: You gathered that info all by yourself in such a short time?

summary: Zoro and Kin'emon Seek Luffy focuses on Unknown person #1, Sanji, Unknown person #2, Unknown person #3, Unknown person #4, Unknown person #5 as sanji and Violet share information, Zoro and Kin'emon try to reach Luffy, and the Donquixote Family reacts to Violet's betrayal.
